message:
test(lab/network): add comprehensive latency and jitter model tests

config.rs:
  Add latency_models_constant_cases test covering all LatencyModel
  variants (Fixed, Uniform, Normal, LogNormal, Bimodal) with
  deterministic edge cases (zero std_dev, equal min/max, 0.0/1.0
  probabilities) to verify exact expected outputs.

  Add jitter_models_respect_bounds test validating that Uniform and
  Bursty JitterModel variants never exceed their configured maximums
  across 100 samples each, with boundary probability testing (0.0 and
  1.0 burst probability).

network.rs:
  Expand network model test coverage with additional scenarios for
  network topology and message delivery behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
